episodes.title: Are YOU in a Cult? (Jehovahs Witnesses)
episodes.description: put feelings and emotions aside... think logically and seek to disprove your in a Cult. #jehovahswitnesses #cult #exjw #jw #jehovahswitnesses

episodes.title: PILLAR Elder wakes up & Leaves Jehovah's witnesses #exjw #jehovahswitness #exjehovahswitnesses #JW
episodes.description: Tony was a pillar in his congregation, being an elder for over 12 years, wakes up realizing all the lies about the organization and finall leaves!  #exjehovahswitnesses #exjw #cult #jwcult #jehovahswitnesses

episodes.title: The Elders came to our home uninvited.
episodes.description: by the way the text message we received mid video was for a call, i accepted the call after the video (i recorded it) Hope you enjoy the video, some crazy invasion of privacy going on... unfortunately...

episodes.title: 🥂 Cheers to Jehovahs Witnesses, But.....
episodes.description: In this video, we expose how man-made rules in religion override God's commands — just like Jesus said in Matthew 15:6-9. The Pharisees replaced God's word with their traditions, and the same is happening today. True worship isn't following men — it's following Christ and God's Word.

episodes.title: Jehovahs witnesses to Disciples of Christ.
Saliendó de los testigos de Jehová
Why leave The Jehovah's Witnesses?
episodes.description: Hello "World" We hope you can relate to our story and know you are NOT alone, Please feel free to reach out to us in the comments or for more personal stuff Our Email is 2Brighter.Lights@gmail.com
